data.title: Hyperliquid’s 50x leverage whale closed its BTC long position and then added ETH long position again, with a total position value of US$210 million and a liquidation price of US$1,846
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, the 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid just closed all BTC long orders and partially reduced its ETH long orders, and then increased its ETH long orders again in a short period of time.
Latest holdings:
Current holdings: ETH long orders, with a total value of approximately US$210 million.
The latest liquidation price of ETH: US$1,866.

data.title: LBank will launch ZORA (ZORA) pre-market trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News LBank announcement shows that LBank will launch ZORA (ZORA) pre-market trading at 18:00 (SGT) on March 12, 2025, and open the ZORA/USDT trading pair. It is reported that the delivery of ZORA pre-market trading will be carried out at the official opening. LBank will redeem ZORA pre-market trading and official trading at a 1:1 token ratio, and promise that ZORA withdrawal time will not be later than other centralized exchanges in the market.

data.title: 21Shares Reduces Management Fees for Bitcoin and Ethereum ETP
data.description:
According to PANews, 21Shares has announced a reduction in the management fees for its Bitcoin and Ethereum Core ETP (ABBA) to 0.49%. This change took effect on March 12, 2025, coinciding with its listing on the Deutsche Börse Xetra platform. The fee adjustment aims to lower the investment threshold, providing more efficient investment opportunities in Bitcoin and Ethereum for a broader range of investors.

ABBA is a fully Bitcoin and Ethereum-backed exchange-traded product. The fee reduction enhances its appeal as a dual-currency investment tool. Additionally, the listing on Xetra is expected to offer European investors increased liquidity, transparency, and convenience, thereby strengthening 21Shares' presence in the European market.

data.title: The 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid once again opened a BTC long position. The current BTC liquidation price is $62,820.37 and the ETH liquidation price is $1,839.4
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, the 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid opened a 20x leveraged BTC long order again while holding a large amount of ETH long orders, further expanding the scale of its holdings.
Latest holdings:
50x ETH long order: 79,351.49 ETH, worth $152 million, liquidation price $1,839.4.
20x BTC long order: 308.68 BTC, worth $25.43 million, average opening price $82,003.9, liquidation price $42,797.
Total holding value: $177 million.
Recent developments:
8 minutes ago, 1.735 million USDC was added to Hyperliquid as margin.
BTC long position increase: Position increased from 147.84 BTC to 308.68 BTC.
Buy order cancellation operation: A 405.69 BTC order was placed at $82,414, and then quickly cancelled, or there is a plan to further increase the position.
For details of the whale's previous operations, please refer to "Review of Hyperliquid contract "insider brother"'s sexy operations, long and short positions opened and closed accurately"

data.title: CMC Altcoin Season Index Stands at 13, Reflecting a Weakening Altcoin Trend
data.description: According to CoinMarketCap (CMC) data, the CMC Altcoin Season Index currently stands at 13. The index measures market performance by analyzing the top 100 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization to determine whether the market is shifting towards altcoins or Bitcoin dominance. Over the past 90 days, 13 of these altcoins have outperformed Bitcoin in terms of price growth, signalling a weakening altcoin trend.

data.title: Megabit will launch BROCCOLI/USDT perpetual contract, supporting up to 75x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Megabit will launch BROCCOLI/USDT 1-75 times perpetual contract at 18:00 (SGT TIME) on March 12, 2025

data.title: Fortress Initiative Aims To Enhance Security In Cryptocurrency Liquidity Management
data.description:
According to PANews, Nano Labs, SlowMist, and Aquarius have announced the establishment of the Fortres Foundation and the launch of the Fortress Initiative. This initiative introduces a security design framework and process audit standards aimed at setting new benchmarks for safety and transparency in cryptocurrency liquidity management. The framework covers various stages of the liquidity management lifecycle, including risk assessment, continuous monitoring, and incident response. It also incorporates measures such as smart contract code audits and multi-chain asset security monitoring to ensure comprehensiveness and practicality.

The Fortress Initiative plans to achieve industry integration through a one-year roadmap, initially focusing on inviting asset management protocols and ecosystem partners with BTC staking needs to participate in its development. The initiative has garnered support from leading industry institutions such as Nano Labs, SlowMist, and Aquarius. Additionally, Takara Lend, a lending protocol supported by the Sei blockchain, has joined as one of the first donor members.

data.title: Base Network Sees Significant Increase In Transactions
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from Dune reveals that the Base network recorded 6.84 million transactions on March 11, marking an 11.9% increase compared to the 6.11 million transactions on February 11.

data.title: Hyperliquid 50x leverage trading giant whale 20x leverage long BTC, opening price 82003.9 USD
data.description: According to data from Hypurrscan, a whale trading on Hyperliquid with 50x leverage started to open long BTC with 20x leverage. Its current position is about 147 BTC (about 12.16 million US dollars), with a cost of 608,000 US dollars, an opening price of 82,003.9 US dollars, and a liquidation price of 42,958 US dollars.
